sourceScope.primarySourceFile: AG 14 - Surveillance Procedure Regarding the Actuarial Opinion for Life and Health Insurers.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: AG 14 - Surveillance Procedure Regarding the Actuarial Opinion for Life and Health Insurers

observedSectionWindows.note: Two-page interim surveillance procedure for review of the Actuarial Opinion for life and health insurers.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single AG 14 PDF.
Do not widen into AG 15 or later guideline files.
Keep the historical / interim procedure posture explicit in every batch artifact.
Treat the guideline as caveat-first historical guidance, not learner-facing policy text.
Keep any PDF text-extraction noise visible as a caveat, not a promotion signal.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Interim surveillance procedure for review of the Actuarial Opinion for life and health insurers
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within pages 1-2 and do not absorb later guideline files.

proposedBatches.title: Two-page AG 14 surveillance procedure

pageTarget.notes: Capture the full two-page interim procedure as a single review-only slice and stop at the page boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full two-page interim procedure as a single review-only slice and stop at the page boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat explicit must, shall, should, or required language as the requirement; preserve the citation and source context.
reviewStandards.reportingRequirement: Treat any instruction to produce, review, or furnish an Actuarial Opinion or related report as reporting context unless the text clearly imposes a broader duty.
reviewStandards.documentationExpectation: Treat requests for support documents, work papers, or explanatory material as documentation expectations unless the source clearly imposes a different duty.
reviewStandards.caveatOnlyHistoricalGuidance: Treat the interim procedure framing as caveat-first historical guidance, not active policy text.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to actuarial opinion instructions, actuarial reports, IRIS ratios, model legislation, regulations, or confidentiality rules as mapping notes unless operational text is included.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title line and framing sentence as background content unless they impose a duty.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the two-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the OCR / encoded text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned
ragReady: review status no longer requires human disposition

currentChecksNeeded: Plan file exists and parses as JSON.
The AG 14 plan markdown exists and carries the expected headings.
Every proposed batch is review-only by default.
The plan keeps the scope to two pages only.
The source posture is explicitly historical / interim procedure.
Each planned batch has a matching batch definition.
The AG 14 batch definition file stays synchronized with the plan.
futureChecksSuggested: Two-page guideline checks for future short guideline files.
No learner-facing, app-ready, or RAG-ready promotion checks.
Text-layer quality caveat checks once extraction starts.
scriptImplications: scripts/ag14-batch-definitions.mjs should stay synchronized with the planned batch-092 slice when extraction is authorized.
scripts/batch-definitions.mjs should import the AG 14 definition file so the shared runner can find the planned batch ID.
scripts/validate-scaffold.mjs should verify that the AG 14 plan file exists, parses cleanly, and preserves the review-only posture.
The shared runner should continue to honor the same stop conditions used for the VM-20 batches.

notes: Controlled AG 14 planning artifact. Planned batch 092 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
